messages.text:
Hi dear, ❤️🥰😘 I'm at work and cannot hear your messages now.
I started working very early this morning and will finish at 8 p.m. Due to our vacation, I'm working many hours and am very tired. I really need our vacation.

Regarding your request, I will do my best to help you, but I don't know when or how much. As you know, I had many expenses for our vacation and didn't expect to order another room at the hotel. I gave you 500 dollars that I thought we could use on vacation, and now we cannot since I gave it to you. So I had many unexpected expenses. You told me that even 500 dollars would help you, and now it's 1,000 dollars more. You have to be considerate that my financial situation is not good since the war here. I will do my best.🥰❤️

messages.text:
It's important for me to be honest and calm with you about this. I really appreciate your desire to help and your attitude towards me, truly. The generator situation is already pressing for me it's winter in Kyiv, and it's not a matter of comfort, but of basic conditions. Therefore, the format of small transfers over several months, unfortunately, isn't very helpful for me right now))

Perhaps we should slightly revise our plans and reschedule the meeting, for example, to February, if you're going through a difficult time right now. I can work more during this time and resolve my current issues, and we can approach the meeting more calmly and without unnecessary tension??)
As for intimacy, I was raised quite traditionally, and for me, the first meeting is primarily about getting to know each other, the atmosphere, and understanding each other. If everything works out between us, intimacy will naturally follow, but it's important for me that it happens without rushing or pressure.
It's important for me to understand that in a relationship, I can count on a man in difficult moments, just as he can count on me. I'm not talking about everyday life I handle all my expenses myself, but there are situations where it's hard to cope alone. I want us to talk about this calmly and with respect for each other))

messages.text:
Good morning, dear ❤️😘. I'm at home now, going to sleep.

I know you expected my help, but honey, I don't have 1,000 Euros to give you. I'm sorry. I tried to get a loan of 1,000 Euros from the bank, and they refused. What can I do? I'm doing my best. You know I had a lot of unexpected expenses for our meeting in Warsaw, and part of it was paid by a loan that I took from the bank. My financial situation is bad since the war here, and you know it, and I don't have 1,000 Euros to give you. My help with 200 euros now and next month is really a lot for me. I can help with 400 euros total. You will have to see where you can get the remaining 600 euros. Please remember that I already gave you 500 USD. I don't have more money, my dear. From where can I give you the 600 euros? You cannot expect all 1,500 euros from me deat. I will give a total of 1,000 USD including the 500 USD, and it's a big help. If we had known that you didn't have electricity before booking the trip to Warsaw and I hadn't had these expenses, I could help you with all 1,500 euros, but now I cannot. Can your boss, who gives you a salary, not give you an advance? And you could work, and she could deduct the advance salary in installments.
If we were not in connection what would you do , how could you get the 1,500 Euros?
